description: 14 Crews Continued from Page 1 ran got out of the passenger cars and surrounded the truck when it came to a halt One of the men identified as Roy _Gottlieb Executive _Direc tor ofthe VI Labor Union asked the driver Are you with the union or the company accord ing to Fitzroy Ccibourne driver of the truck _ Colbourne answered Dont ask me any questions Then according to witnesses at the scene Gottlieb reached ihrough the open cab window grabbed the driver by the throat andsaid What do you mean dont ask me questions Gentlemen weve got a strike going on If you are resisting someone IS going to end up getting nuri or even killed R The seven men then returned to the cars blocking the road and removed picket signs that they hung around their nmecks and blocked the path es the Caribe truck At that moment Moran arrived on the scene in his car and the pickets removed the blockade and moved 0 the side of the road The truck and Morans car proceeded down the road to the development One of the pickets walked in front of Morans car the con struction chief saidofas he
